decisions.message: FIRST MISSION VICTORY! Region Secured at Turn 4 with grid power 2/7. Volatile Vek bonus completed. 135 civilians saved. Ralph Karlsson KIA. Solver v2 (enemy attack simulation + grid power multiplier + body-blocking + push direction scoring) successfully protected buildings through all 4 turns.
